response: No, Steve Perry and Dennis Lyxzén are not both members of the same band. Steve Perry is an American singer, songwriter, and record producer best known as the lead singer of the rock band Journey. Dennis Lyxzén is a Swedish musician best known as the lead vocalist for the Swedish hardcore punk band Refused and is currently the vocalist in INVSN. The context does not indicate any relationship between Steve Perry and Dennis Lyxzén as members of the same band.
